name: cap-raycast
title: Cap
description: Control Cap recordings and switch devices through deeplinks.
author: cap

commands.name: cap-control
commands.title: Cap Control
commands.subtitle: Cap
commands.description: Start, stop, pause, and resume Cap recordings.

commands.name: switch-device
commands.title: Switch Device
commands.subtitle: Cap
commands.description: Switch Cap microphone and camera inputs.

scripts.smoke:devices: tsc scripts/device-parser-smoke.ts src/lib/devices.ts --outDir ../../target/raycast-device-smoke --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --target es2022 --strict --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --types node && node ../../target/raycast-device-smoke/scripts/device-parser-smoke.js
